The '''''Toten''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] that served as the personal transportation of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was first spotted during the raid on Science Station Youst just about to enter hyperspace. The shuttle was also used by Harkov to hide in space station [[DS 5]]. It was then sent out as a decoy attempt as part of Harkov's attempt to escape. However [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] not only saw through the deception, he also stopped Harkov, who was trying to escape in the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Geddawai]]. It was then destroyed as there was no use for it.

{{Ship-stub}}
